name: video_sourcing
description: Find, compare, and analyze social videos from YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and Twitter/X. Use this when users want to discover trending videos, analyze creator content, or get specific video links for a topic. This is the primary tool for all video sourcing requests - invoke it when user asks about video trends, creator analysis, or explicitly uses /video_sourcing. For deterministic /video_sourcing commands, use with ux_mode='three_message'; for free-form queries, omit ux_mode for flexible behavior.

query.description: Search query for video sourcing (e.g., 'AI news trending', 'tech reviewer TikTok', 'climate change videos')

event_detail.description: Output detail level: 'compact' for concise summary, 'verbose' for raw payloads and debugging info

ux_mode.description: UX mode for deterministic behavior: 'three_message' enables throttled progress updates. Omit for free-form flexible behavior.

progress_gate_seconds.description: Progress gate timeout in seconds. Default 10. Only relevant when ux_mode is set.
